hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not commit directly to main/master. Create a feature branch first.' >&2; exit 1; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); merged=$(gh pr list --state merged --head "$branch" --json number --jq 'length' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$merged" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Could not verify branch status. Check gh auth." >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ "$merged" -gt 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Branch '$branch' already has a merged PR. Run: git checkout main && git pull && git checkout -b new-branch-name" >&2; exit 1; fi
npx @biomejs/biome check ./src --no-errors-on-unmatched 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: Fix lint errors before committing.' >&2; exit 1; }
branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not push directly to main/master. Use a PR.' >&2; exit 1; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); merged=$(gh pr list --state merged --head "$branch" --json number --jq 'length' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$merged" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Could not check merged PR status for '$branch'. Verify gh auth and try again." >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ "$merged" -gt 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Branch '$branch' already has a merged PR. Create a new branch." >&2; exit 1; fi

npx @biomejs/biome check ./src --no-errors-on-unmatched 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: Fix lint errors before creating PR.' >&2; exit 1; }; npm run build 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: Build failed. Fix errors before creating PR.' >&2; exit 1; }

grep -rn --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.astro' --include='*.mjs' -E '(ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|OPENAI_API_KEY|SECRET_KEY|DATABASE_URL|password\s*=\s*["'\'']).{8,}' src/ scripts/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read -r line; do echo "SECRET WARNING: Possible secret found — $line" >&2; done; exit 0
